speaker: Radosław Sikorski
text: Today's right-wing populist movement is not authentic conservatism; Edmund Burke, Churchill, Thatcher, Roger Scruton, and Bill Buckley would not approve of what is being done in conservatism's name.
context: Listing his own conservative reference points.

addressed_in_artifacts.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
